folio.label: 84v
folio.l: I preye to god saue thy body , and Seynt Loy
Now is my Cart , out of the slow parde
Loo brother q¶ the fend , what told I the
Here may ©e se , myn owen dere brother
The charl spak oo thyngö , but he thou©t a nother
Late vs go fortú , a bouten oure vyage
Heere wynne I no thyngö , vp on this cariage
Whan that they comen , som what out of toune
This Sompnour to his brother , gan to roune
Brother q¶ he , here wonetú an olde rebekke
That had almost , as lef to lese hire nekke
As for to ©eue , a peny of hire good
I wol haue twelue pans , thougú æ she be wood
Or I wyl somoune hire , vn to oure office
And ©et god wot , of hire knowe I no vice
But for æè canst not , as in this contree
Wynne thy cost , take here ensaumple of me
This Sompnoå clappetú , at the wydewes gate
Come out q¶ he , thow old , very trate
I trowe æè hast , som Frere or prest witú the
Who clappetú there , seitú this wyf , benedicite
God saue ©ow Sire , what is ©oure swete wylle
I haue q¶ he , of somouns here a bille
Vp peyne of cursynge , loke that thow be
To morwe byfore , the Archedekenes kne
To answere vn to the courte , of certeyne thynges
Now lord q¶ she , crist iúu , kyngö of kynges
So wysly help me , as I ne may
I haue ben seeke , and that ful many a day
I may nat go q¶ she , so fer , ne ryde
But I be ded , so pryketú it in my syde
May I nat aske , a libel Sire Sompnour
And answere there , be my ¸curatour
To swiche thyngö , as men wold appose me
ñis q¶ this Sompnour , paye a noon lat se
Twelue pens to me , and I wol the acquyte
I shal no ¸fyt han ther by , but lyte
My Maister hatú the ¸fyt , and nat I
Come of , and late me ryden , hastily
ñeue me twelue pans , I may no lengere tarye
Twelue pens q¶ she , now lady Seynt Marye
So wysly help me , out of care and synne
This wyde world , thougú æ I shuld it wynne
Ne haue I nat twelue pans , with Inne myn holde
ñe knowen wel , that I am pore and olde
Kythe ©oure almesse , on me pore wrecche
Nay tha~ne q¶ he , the foule fend me fecche
